records.question: Which categories in the Chocolate catalog published by Koepp-Rutherford handmade chocolate store have attribute values of 0 and were published on or before 2013-03-15 05:09:17 with their latest revision on or before 2017-09-26 12:10:36?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalogs.date_of_publication <= '2013-03-15 05:09:17' AND catalogs.catalog_name = 'Chocolate' AND catalogs.date_of_latest_revision <= '2017-09-26 12:10:36' AND catalogs.catalog_publisher = 'Koepp-Rutherford handmade chocolate store' AND catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Category' AND catalog_contents_additional_attributes.attribute_value = '0'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.catalog_id FROM Catalogs AS T1 INNER JOIN Catalog_Structure AS T2 ON T1.catalog_id = T2.catalog_id INNER JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes AS T3 ON T2.catalog_level_number = T3.catalog_level_number WHERE T1.catalog_name = 'Chocolate' AND T1.catalog_publisher = 'Koepp-Rutherford handmade chocolate store' AND T3.attribute_value = '0' AND T1.date_of_publication <= '2013-03-15 05:09:17' AND T1.date_of_latest_revision <= '2017-09-26 12:10:36'

records.question: What catalog structures include Diet Pepsi entries with a length of exactly 8 and height of exactly 3, belong to the Chocolate catalog revised on 2017-09-26 12:10:36, and have additional attributes where the value is 0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents.length = '8' AND catalogs.catalog_name = 'Chocolate' AND catalog_contents.catalog_entry_name = 'Diet Pepsi' AND catalog_contents.height = '3' AND catalogs.date_of_latest_revision = '2017-09-26 12:10:36' AND catalog_contents_additional_attributes.attribute_value = '0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure AS T1
INNER JOIN Catalogs AS T2
  ON T1.catalog_id = T2.catalog_id
INNER JOIN Catalog_Contents AS T3
  ON T1.catalog_level_number = T3.catalog_level_number
INNER JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes AS T4
  ON T3.catalog_entry_id = T4.catalog_entry_id
WHERE
  T2.catalog_name = 'Chocolate' AND T2.date_of_latest_revision = '2017-09-26 12:10:36' AND T3.catalog_entry_name = 'Diet Pepsi' AND T3.length = '8' AND T3.height = '3' AND T4.attribute_value = '0'
